0.explanation:

Since this is a servlet context, deleteOnExit() only deletes the file when the JVM shuts down, which does not occur when the servlet method exits, so the temp file is not released before the method exits. The cleanup registration only runs on the normal successful execution path without prior exceptions, providing no guaranteed release before method exit.
(2) Second line: Answer: Yes
